div.p: Search products, filter by category, and quickly add to cart.

div.style: position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100px; height:100px; background:#f3f4f6; border-radius:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#6b7280; font-size:12px; text-align:center;

div.p: Quick snapshot of stock, movement, and alerts.

t.p: No fast-moving items at the moment.
No products yet. Add products to see category statistics.

div.p: Manage your products, prices, and stock.
Track stock levels, manage adjustments, and monitor reorder alerts.
Manage product categories, view statistics, and organize your inventory.
Add suppliers, manage their details, track supplied products and purchase orders.

t.p: No suppliers yet. Click “Add Supplier” to create one.

div.p: Manage your customers, view their purchases, and reward loyalty.

t.p: No customers yet. Add your first customer to start tracking purchases.
No orders yet for this customer.

div.p: View and manage customer orders, track order status, and generate receipts.
No orders yet. Create your first order from the POS section.
View sales performance and product trends.
Manage staff members, roles, and activity.
Configure POS dashboard preferences and behavior.

div.span: Use darker colors for low-light environments.
Play feedback sounds on key actions.
Automatically print receipt after order completion.

div.p: To keep your data safe, close your POS session when leaving the terminal.
